item.title: KPI data quality laboratory
item.description: Developed a Python automation pipeline using Selenium and Pandas to insert, analyze and extract metrics from AU480 quality control data.

item.title: web-scraping-app-python
item.description: Developed a Python automation pipeline using Selenium and Pandas to extract, clean, store, and analyze AU480 quality control data, improving lab performance monitoring and reducing manual entry errors.

item.title: Laboratory Data Dashboard
item.description: Streamlit web app for automated QC and reporting.

item.title: Excel/CSV Laboratory Data Automation
item.description: Built an Excel VBA automation tool for laboratory workflows, enabling structured data entry, CSV processing, automated reports, and faster handling of repetitive spreadsheet tasks.

item.title: Bioinformatics Sequence Analyzer
item.description: Tool for DNA/protein sequence analysis using Biopython.

item.title: Clinical Data Analysis Pipeline
item.description: Python-based analysis of COVID-19 clinical data with statistical modeling and visualization.
